name: Corn and Pork Kebabs with Rosemary Green Beans and Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons dried hot red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare grill and, if using bamboo skewers, soak in water for 30 minutes.
2. Shuck corn and cut crosswise into twenty-four 1-inch pieces. Cut pork into thirty-two 1-inch pieces. Thread three pieces of corn and four pieces of pork onto each skewer.
3. In a small bowl whisk together 1 tablespoon vinegar, 4 1/2 teaspoons olive oil, red pepper flakes, and salt. Divide the red pepper mixture between two small bowls to prevent potential contamination from uncooked meat juices.
4. Brush kebabs with the red pepper mixture from one bowl. Grill on a lightly oiled rack set 5 to 6 inches over glowing coals, turning occasionally, until pork is cooked through (15 to 20 minutes).
5. With a clean brush, coat kebbs with the red pepper mixture from the other bowl.
6. While grilling kebabs, trim and halve green beans. Cut potatoes into 1/8-inch-thick slices and finely chop rosemary. In a steamer, arrange potatoes and layer green beans. Steam until potatoes are tender (6 to 8 minutes).
7. In a large bowl whisk together the remaining tablespoon vinegar, remaining 2 teaspoons olive oil, rosemary, garlic, and salt and pepper to taste. Add hot vegetables and toss to combine.
8. Serve kebabs with vegetables.
